calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. Arnola W. Evje, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Vincent Kircher and Defendant, Eng Hau appeared in pro per. The matter settled per stipulation of parties and not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.

APPEARANCES:
